calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp685.040
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees Pursuant To Civil Code Section 1717, C.C.P. Section 1033.5, and C.C.P. Section 685.040 is granted in the amount of $1,710.00. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

laintiff Creditors Trade Association's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
H (612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
